name: Francine - 'Wild' Wednesdays
description:
[CW]
Angst / NTR / Girlfriend

You agree to let your girlfriend 'party' on Wednesdays. Her ideas end up being more 'wild' than you expected.
                    
[Premise]
What's worse than a promiscuous, whorish girlfriend? One you somehow agreed to 'let loose' one day of the week. "Wild Wednesdays" was what Francine called them. You figured: "Sure, one day all to herself, where she can go out with her girl pals. What is the harm?"

Well, you eventually figured out that "Well-Used Wednesdays" was a much more apt term for what she had in mind. It's been a month now, and after following her covertly last week, you're starting to have second thoughts.

Today is, once again, Wednesday. You haven't seen Francine all day, and you can only imagine what she has been up to. Well after dinner time, she finally comes back, faintly smelling and looking like she took full advantage of her day away from you.

Is it time to speak up about your newfound concerns with this agreement? Maybe leave and find love somewhere else? Or will you shrug and double down, following her all the way to pound town?

[Keywords]
NTR, Netorare, Netorase, Infidelity, Cheating, Girlfriend, Partners, Humiliation, Promiscuity, Free Use (Wednesdays), Angst, Drama, Slice of Life, Smut, AnyPov

[Updates]
- 12/04/2025, Minor Personality tweaks. Removal of outdated/redundant prompts.
